action.reasoning: The root task is to create a complete business plan with five major components. This is too large for a single EXECUTE action and requires parallel decomposition. I will spawn five subtasks, one for each component of the business plan, and take on the integration role myself to assemble the final document.

subtasks.goal: Conduct market analysis for a Korean local-review platform.
subtasks.capsule: Analyze the Korean local services market, including size, growth trends, user demographics, and key drivers. Focus on the demand for authentic local reviews in Korea, covering sectors like dining, beauty, and lifestyle. This feeds the overall business plan's market context.

outputs.description: Comprehensive market analysis for Korean local-review platform

subtasks.goal: Conduct competitor analysis for the Korean local-review space.
subtasks.capsule: Identify and analyze key competitors such as Naver Blog/Cafe, Naver Place, Daum, Instagram, and niche review sites. Evaluate their strengths, weaknesses, market share, and gaps in the market that a new platform could exploit.

outputs.description: Detailed competitor analysis of existing Korean local-review platforms

subtasks.goal: Design the revenue model for the Korean local-review platform.
subtasks.capsule: Propose a sustainable revenue model including options like sponsored listings, premium merchant accounts, affiliate marketing, data insights, and advertising. Include pricing strategies and projected revenue streams.

outputs.description: Revenue model design with pricing strategies and monetization channels

subtasks.goal: Develop a go-to-market strategy for the Korean local-review platform.
subtasks.capsule: Create a phased GTM plan covering user acquisition, merchant onboarding, marketing channels, partnerships, and growth hacks tailored to the Korean digital ecosystem. Include timeline and key milestones.

outputs.description: Go-to-market strategy with acquisition, onboarding, and growth plans

subtasks.goal: Create financial projections for the Korean local-review platform.
subtasks.capsule: Build a 3-5 year financial projection including revenue, costs, headcount, marketing spend, and key metrics. Include break-even analysis and funding requirements.

outputs.description: 3-5 year financial projections with P&L, cash flow, and key metrics

self_role.goal: Integrate all subtask outputs into a cohesive, polished business plan document.

outputs.description: Final integrated business plan for Korean local-review platform
